title: Navigate to product catalog and view product list
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Click the Shop or category navigation link
Verify the product listing page loads
Verify multiple product tiles are visible
expected_result: A list of products is displayed with multiple product tiles visible
kane_objective: Go to ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io, navigate to the product catalog, and verify that a list of products is displayed
source_description: User can navigate to the product catalog and see a list of products

title: Apply a brand filter to narrow product results
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Go to a product category page
Find a brand filter in the left sidebar such as Apple or Samsung
Click the brand filter
Verify the product list updates to show filtered results
expected_result: Product list is filtered to show only products matching the selected brand
kane_objective: On ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io go to the Phones category page and click the Apple brand filter in the left sidebar to filter the product list
source_description: User can apply a brand filter from the sidebar to narrow product results

title: Click a product to view its detail page
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Go to the product catalog
Click on any product tile
Verify the product detail page loads
Verify the product name and price are visible
expected_result: Product detail page is displayed with name and price visible
kane_objective: On ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io click on any product in the catalog to open its detail page and verify the product name and price are shown
source_description: User can click a product to open its detail page and see the name and price

title: Browse products and homepage without logging in
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/ without logging in
Verify the homepage loads with featured products or banners
Verify no login prompt blocks browsing
expected_result: Homepage and products are visible without requiring a login
kane_objective: Visit ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io without logging in and verify that products or featured items are visible on the page
source_description: User can browse products and the homepage without logging in

title: Search for a product by name and see relevant results
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Type 'iPhone' into the search bar
Submit the search
Verify search results show products related to iPhone
expected_result: Search results page shows products matching the search term iPhone
kane_objective: On ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io use the search bar to search for iPhone and verify that relevant product results are shown
source_description: User can search for a product by name and see relevant results
